# Great Value High Life

## Project
- Name: Great Value High Life
- Marketed as: Highlife Tech Zone 4
- Developer: Great Value Realty (founded 1970)
- Location: Dream Valley, Tech Zone IV, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh 201306, India
- RERA: Registration under process with UP RERA — contact sales for latest status
- Towers: 2 — High Life 1 (HL1, G+26), High Life 2 (HL2, G+18)
- Structure: Residential rising above a commercial G+4 podium
- Configurations: 1 BHK and 2 BHK flexi apartments

## Unit sizes and starting prices
- 1 BHK High Life 1: 941 sq ft — ₹94 Lakhs onwards
- 1 BHK High Life 2: 964 sq ft — ₹90 Lakhs onwards
- 2 BHK High Life 1: 1,410 sq ft — ₹1.41 Crore onwards
- 2 BHK High Life 2: 1,454 sq ft — ₹1.36 Crore onwards

## Payment plan
Pay 10% Now, No Payment For Next 24 Months. Festive offer includes free car parking, road PLC, power backup, electric infrastructure and 2 years free maintenance — savings up to ₹27.63 Lakhs. Subject to availability and developer terms.

## EMI
Easy EMI starting from ₹595 per day with a down payment of ₹9 Lakhs.

## Possession
Tentative 2026–2028. Contact sales for the latest construction milestone.

## Amenities
Swimming pool, gymnasium, yoga pavilion, banquet hall, badminton court, toddler play area, topiary garden, open lawn, 24/7 security, high-speed lifts, power backup (1 KVA for 1 BHK, 2 KVA for 2 BHK), earthquake-resistant RCC construction, 2 years free maintenance, road-facing units, fire safety on every floor. Each unit gets 1 dedicated car parking and a spacious balcony.

## Location and connectivity
- Numed Hospital: 3.5 km
- Yatharth Hospital: 4 km
- Kailash Hospital: 10 km
- Fortis Noida: 11 km
- Shri Ram Universal School: 3.5 km
- Ryan International School: 4 km
- D-Mart: 3 km
- Gaur City Mall: 4 km
- R Systems: 3.5 km
- Kyndryl: 3.5 km
- Artha Infratech: 3.5 km
- Yotta Data Center: 7 km
- Jewar International Airport: ~35–40 km via Noida Expressway

## Developer background
Great Value Realty is a Delhi NCR developer founded in 1970. The group's portfolio spans residential, commercial and retail across NCR, including Great Value Mall, Great Value Sharanam, Great Value Vilasa and Great Value Ekanam. Five decades of operating history.

## Contact
- Sales phone: +91 94122 34688
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919412234688
- Site URL: https://highlifenoida.in/

## Important disclosure
This advertisement is for information purposes only and does not constitute an offer for sale. Project registration is under process with UP RERA. Buyers must independently verify the registration status before any booking. Marketed in association with authorised channel partners.
